items.line_en: Chloe, stop taking pictures! We are late! Our flight is at 10 o'clock!

coach.say: Chloe, stop taking pictures! We are late! Our flight is at 10 o'clock!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Chloe, / stop taking pictures! / We are late! / Our flight is at 10 o'clock!

items.line_en: Chill Sophia, we have plenty of time! Look at this filter! Summer vibes! It is 915!

coach.hint: Chunk it: Chill Sophia, we have plenty of time! / Look at this filter! Summer vibes! It is 915!

coach.hint: Chunk it: Traffic is terrible! / Driver, / can you go faster please? / We are in a hurry!

items.line_en: Oh look, I forgot my neck pillow! Can we buy one at the airport?

coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh look, / I forgot my neck pillow! / Can we buy one at the airport?

coach.hint: Chunk it: We don't have time for Pillow's Chloe, / we need to run!

items.line_en: Here you go! My bag is 15 kilograms perfect!

items.line_en: This is so heavy! Miness your bag is 32 kilograms! The limit is 23 kilograms!

items.line_en: You must pay an extra $100!

coach.hint: Chunk it: You must pay an extra $100!

coach.hint: Chunk it: Is it okay now?

items.line_en: 23 kilograms. Fine, go!
